reads.note: repo.watchDebt(debtId) -> DebtView (debt joined with customer + payment progress). Consumed to compose the reminder message text and pay-link at runtime. DebtView.remaining = amount - paidAmount, clamped.
repo.watchBusiness() -> BusinessProfile. Supplies signoff + tone selection for message composition and the Paystack subaccount for the pay-link.

actions.name: sendReminder
actions.note: repo.sendReminder(debt, channel, scheduledFor). Records reminder history (maps to POST /reminders per conventions). Mode 1 'Send now' opens a WhatsApp/SMS deep link client-side (already shipped, out of backend scope) then records; scheduled sends are the automated/server-side path. Message text is composed at runtime from debt+business (templated by reminderTone: Gentle/Friendly/Firm), not stored client-side as a dataset. Per conventions: sms/whatsapp automated sends debit the send-allowance ledger; manual/call and printable are recorded-only and free/unmetered. Screen only emits channel sms|whatsapp (code enum ReminderChannelDb = {sms, whatsapp, call}); manual/printable exist in the convention channel set.

actions.name: createPayLink
actions.note: PaystackLinkService.createPayLink(debtId, amount, subaccount) seam -> maps to POST /debts/:id/pay-link. Generates the debtor pay-link (Paystack payment request against the business subaccount) embedded in the reminder. Stubbed client-side today returning https://pay.oweme.app/d/:debtId?a=:amount; the real link is created server-side and reconciled via POST /webhooks/paystack. Invoked inside sendReminder before the reminder row is written.

authContext.note: No client-side role gate on this screen. Per conventions role model (owner|staff), staff may read/write debts and send reminders; sending is not owner-restricted.

uiStatesHandled: loading (SizedBox.shrink while watchDebt view is null)
compose/preview (live _PreviewBubble with composed message + embedded pay-link)
error-no-phone (customer has no phone digits -> snackbar, send aborted)
deep-link-fallback (composer could not open -> message copied to clipboard)
